doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026) and its legal substance fundamentally contradicts established GDPR principles and CJEU jurisprudence regarding pseudonymized data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
